MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER TOWNSEND AND TOWNSEND AND CREW LLP'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.
APPEARANCE: Richard L. Grossman, Esq. of Townsend and Townsend and Crew LLP 576-0200 for petitioner & moving party; John F. Barg, Esq. of Barg Coffin Lewis & Trapp, LLP 228-5400 for respondents & opposing parties Hinkle Hensley Shanor & Martin LLP and Freedman Boyd Daniels Hollander Goldberg & Cline, P.A.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. Parties to confer on order. If any objections, each party may submit their own form of order. (302/PHA/AP) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
